title: Las minas de Salomón Rey
overview: King Solomon is a great seducer, he cannot contain himself in view of women. But having so many of them at the same time starts to become a problem.

trailers.title: Podría haberla visto en sala... pero nunca quise ver LAS MINAS DE SALOMON REY
